chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Hasan Ibn Ali Ibn Faddal

text: و ما كان فيه عن الحسن بن عليّ بن فضّال فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد بن عبد اللّه، عن أحمد بن محمّد بن عيسى، عن الحسن بن عليّ بن فضّال‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sad ibn Abdullah, from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Isa, from Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal.
